title: Online STEM Facilitator
details: At STEM Montessori, I developed and taught six coding courses covering Python and HTML/CSS for students aged 10-18. I facilitated beginner to advanced levels, delivered engaging 1-hour lectures, and fostered active learning and interpersonal connections among 100 students.

title: Student Software Developer
details: As a Student Developer at Knead Technologies, I designed an intuitive dashboard and developed features using ReactJS, PHP (Laravel), Apache, and MySQL, all within a Docker environment. I collaborated with a team of six in Agile Sprints, conducted E2E testing with Cypress, and unit testing with PHPUnit. Additionally, I created comprehensive documentation for the codebase and user resources.

title: Full Stack Developer
details: As a Full Stack Developer at ScaleupMap, I transform designs into fully functional code across frontend and backend. I develop the frontend using React and Next.js, handle backend development with Go and Python, manage data with PostgreSQL through DBeaver, and work on creating AI services, agents, and chatbots leveraging Google Gemini.

organization: Independent Research - Prof. George S. Cembrowski
title: Research Assistant - Clinical AI & Technical Consulting
details: Authored an 8-page consultation report evaluating commercial software, computer-vision frameworks, model-training feasibility, and PHI-safe video-analysis workflows. Defined MVP and ideal-product requirements (inversion counting, cap-color tube identification, face blurring). Coordinated and attended meetings with external experts to refine project scope and technical direction.

organization: Independent Research - Prof. George S. Cembrowski
title: Research Assistant - Clinical Informatics & LLM Analysis
details: Performed large-scale literature synthesis on seasonal and diurnal variation across hematology, chemistry, and coagulation analytes. Produced a ~90-page analyte-by-analyte report comparing interpretations from three LLMs (ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Claude) with complete academic references.
